news.t: Vanguard Announces Share Splits for Six Equity ETFs

holdings.infoBox: IVOO is an equity ETF with a total of 405 individual holdings. The top holdings are Flex Ltd. stock at 1.57%, Twilio at 0.82%, TechnipFMC at 0.79%, Curtiss-Wright at 0.78%, and nVent Electric at 0.77%.

overview.description: The Vanguard S&P Mid-Cap 400 ETF (IVOO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Mid Cap 400 index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of mid-cap US companies. IVOO was launched on Sep 9, 2010 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: Vanguard Announces Share Splits for Six Equity ETFs
data.text: VALLEY FORGE, Pa. , Feb. 22, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Vanguard today announced plans to execute forward share splits for six equity ETFs.
